ai_preview.text:
**Metaloglobus and Hermannstadt square off in a dead-rubber showdown** — both teams stuck in neutral, neither side pulling away. 🔴

Metaloglobus are winless in five (2D, 3L) and leaking goals on the road, while Hermannstadt aren't much better: a solitary win in their last five with draws piling up. Both sides love a stalemate — their last two head-to-heads ended 0-0 and 1-1. This has all the makings of a grinding midfield battle.

Key storylines:

- **Metaloglobus need to stop the bleeding** — they've lost three of their last five away from home, so staying solid at Stadionul Metaloglobus matters
- **Hermannstadt's draw addiction** — three draws in five games shows a team content to not lose, which could make this tight
- **Attacking depth test** — Jair and C. Neguț will be tasked with breaking down a side desperate for three points

- **Olympic Safi's midfield** (F. D. Ngoma and S. E. Bouchqali) need to stem the tide early or this gets out of hand
